Weapon

Aureus Drone Controller

petSpawner
TypepetSpawner
Damage24
Range250
Reload50ms

Media

Sustain soundlaser1.mp3

How To Read This Weapon

Damage typeEnergy
Per hit24
Shot total240per hit x hit count
Approx. DPS4800shot total + DoT / reload
Heat per sec16000
Hits per shot10
TagsDoT, Multi-hit, petSpawner
  • Summons and controls a Monachus fighters.
  • The Monachus receives 75% of player Hp
  • Disables Target Shield regen for 3 seconds

Combat Stats

DoT0
DoT duration3
Range250
Radius0
Reload50ms
Heat cost800
TypepetSpawner

  • Fire sound: n/a n/a
  • Hit sound: n/a n/a
  • Icon: ti_monachus.png

Tech Levels

LevelDescriptionProjectilePrimary MaterialSecondary Material
1Increase Damage by 25%FlameSteel x400n/a
2Increase damage by 40%. Increase flame speed by 20%. FlameSteel x800n/a
3Increase damage by 52%. Increase flame speed by 20%. FlameSteel x1600n/a
4Increase damage by 64%.FlameSteel x3200Hydrogen Crystal x400
